lead: Module behaviour, class/rating mechanics and weapon facts on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Canonical module definitions — the per-module availability (sizes & ratings) and core stats (output, optimal/max mass, capacities, bins, ranges) quoted on every card are taken from this repo's modules/standard, modules/internal and modules/hardpoints JSON.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Fandom Wiki — Outfitting
sources.what: Slot families (core/optional/hardpoint/utility), the A–E rating and 1–8 size system, and per-module roles.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Fandom Wiki — Weapons & Thargoid Combat
sources.what: Weapon families, fixed/gimballed/turreted mounts, hardpoint sizes 1–4, damage types, and Guardian/AX weapon definitions.

sources.label: Inara — Modules
sources.what: Per-module stats and class/rating cross-checks across core, optional, hardpoint and utility modules.

sources.label: EDSM — Outfitting FAQ
sources.what: Utility-mount module list (shield booster, countermeasures, scanners, xeno utilities) and slot mechanics.

sources.label: EDSY & Coriolis
sources.what: Build planners referenced in Getting Modules for laying out a fit and producing an exact class/rating/variant shopping list before buying.

sources.label: YouTube — TheYamiks
sources.what: Beginner outfitting walkthrough: the four module slot types, A-E rating and class trade-offs, and assembling a build.
